Metadata.title: PDF Tools | Free PDF Merge, Split, Compress
Metadata.description: Merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs for free — no sign-up required.

Footer.notice: Uploaded files are automatically deleted after processing.

Home.title: Every PDF task in one place
Home.subtitle: Merge, split, compress, and convert — free, no sign-up required.

Common.dropzonePlaceholder: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select
Common.dropzoneChangeHint: Click to choose a different file
Common.selectFile: Please select a file to convert.

merge_pdf.name: Merge PDF
merge_pdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one

split_pdf.name: Split PDF
split_pdf.description: Split a PDF by page or extract a page range

compress_pdf.name: Compress PDF
compress_pdf.description: Reduce file size while keeping quality

watermark_pdf.name: Add Watermark
watermark_pdf.description: Insert a text or image watermark

protect_pdf.name: Protect / Unlock PDF
protect_pdf.description: Add or remove a password on a PDF

pdf_to_image.name: PDF to Image
pdf_to_image.description: Convert each PDF page to a PNG/JPG image

image_to_pdf.name: Image to PDF
image_to_pdf.description: Combine JPG or PNG images into a single PDF

pdf_to_word.name: PDF to Word
pdf_to_word.description: Convert a PDF into an editable Word document

word_to_pdf.name: Word to PDF
word_to_pdf.description: Convert a Word document to PDF

pdf_to_ppt.name: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf_to_ppt.description: Convert each PDF page into a PowerPoint slide

ppt_to_pdf.name: PowerPoint to PDF
ppt_to_pdf.description: Convert a PowerPoint document to PDF

pdf_to_excel.name: PDF to Excel
pdf_to_excel.description: Convert tables in a PDF into an Excel file

excel_to_pdf.name: Excel to PDF
excel_to_pdf.description: Convert an Excel file to PDF

pdf_to_html.name: PDF to HTML
pdf_to_html.description: Convert a PDF into an HTML web page

html_to_pdf.name: HTML to PDF
html_to_pdf.description: Convert an HTML file to PDF

MergePage.title: Merge PDF
MergePage.description: Arrange multiple PDF files in any order and combine them into one.
MergePage.dropzonePlaceholder: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to select
MergePage.needTwoFiles: You need at least 2 PDF files to merge.

SplitPage.title: Split PDF
SplitPage.description: Split a PDF into individual pages or extract just the pages you need.
SplitPage.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to split.
SplitPage.enterRange: Please enter the page range to extract. e.g. 1-3, 5, 8-10
SplitPage.rangeHint: Enter page numbers or ranges separated by commas.

WatermarkPage.title: Add Watermark
WatermarkPage.description: Insert a diagonal text watermark on every page.
WatermarkPage.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to add a watermark to.
WatermarkPage.error: An error occurred while adding the watermark.

ProtectPage.title: Protect / Unlock PDF
ProtectPage.description: Add a password to a PDF, or remove an existing one.

CompressPage.title: Compress PDF
CompressPage.description: Re-compress each page as an image to reduce file size.
CompressPage.warning: Most effective on scanned or image-heavy PDFs. After compressing, text can no longer be selected or copied.
CompressPage.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to compress.
CompressPage.qualityHint: Lower values produce smaller files but lower quality.

ImageToPdfPage.title: Image to PDF
ImageToPdfPage.description: Arrange JPG or PNG images in any order and combine them into one PDF.
ImageToPdfPage.dropzonePlaceholder: Drag and drop images here, or click to select
ImageToPdfPage.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one image file.

PdfToImagePage.title: PDF to Image
PdfToImagePage.description: Convert each PDF page into an image. If there are multiple pages, the result is downloaded as a ZIP.
PdfToImagePage.selectFile: Please select a PDF file to convert.

PdfToWordPage.title: PDF to Word
PdfToWordPage.description: Convert a PDF into an editable Word (.docx) document.
PdfToWordPage.warning: PDFs with complex layouts may have slightly different formatting after conversion.

WordToPdfPage.title: Word to PDF
WordToPdfPage.description: Convert a Word (.docx, .doc) document to PDF.

PdfToPptPage.title: PDF to PowerPoint
PdfToPptPage.description: Convert each PDF page into a PowerPoint (.pptx) slide.
PdfToPptPage.warning: Slide layout may vary depending on the text/image placement in the original PDF.

PptToPdfPage.title: PowerPoint to PDF
PptToPdfPage.description: Convert a PowerPoint (.pptx, .ppt) document to PDF.

PdfToExcelPage.title: PDF to Excel
PdfToExcelPage.description: Detect table data inside a PDF and convert it to an Excel (.xlsx) file.
PdfToExcelPage.warning: Most accurate on simple tables in text-based PDFs. Scanned or complex-layout tables may have misaligned cells.

ExcelToPdfPage.title: Excel to PDF
ExcelToPdfPage.description: Convert an Excel (.xlsx, .xls, .csv) file to PDF.

PdfToHtmlPage.title: PDF to HTML
PdfToHtmlPage.description: Convert a PDF into an HTML web page.
PdfToHtmlPage.warning: PDFs with images are provided as a ZIP file (HTML + images).

HtmlToPdfPage.title: HTML to PDF
HtmlToPdfPage.description: Convert an HTML file to PDF.
